title: Three-core small-sample quota and packet regression
instructions: Create a compact plan containing exactly three core activities for the supplied synthetic text and show the adult-facing audit. Include one printable packet layout.

criteria.title: Correct denominator
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if exactly three activities are labeled core and optional items, if any, are excluded from n.

criteria.title: Correct small-sample counts
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the audit requires at least 2 toy-like, all 3 autonomous, and 0 fixed-organizer core activities.

criteria.title: Distinct mechanics
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if all three core activities use distinct mechanics rather than claiming four are required.

criteria.title: Packet rule
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the required loop and navigation fit Pages A-B and Page C is absent or explicitly optional.
